data.title: FutureFuel Redirects Capital to Growth Investments and Share Repurchases
data.description: BATESVILLE, Ark., March 31, 2026 - FutureFuel Corp. disclosed today that its Board of Directors has decided to lower the quarterly dividend to $0.01 per share for the second quarter of 2026. The dividend, announced with a record date of June 4, 2026, and a payment date of June 18, 2026, is part of a strategic move by the company to allocate resources towards expansion initiatives and buyback shares when advantageous.

data.title: Onconetix Appoints David White as Chief Executive Officer and Sammy Dorf as Member of the Board of Directors
data.description: A highly skilled leadership team is ready to finalize the acquisition of Realbotix LLC. This acquisition promises to bring significant changes and benefits to the company. The experienced team is poised to drive long-term value for shareholders through this transformative opportunity.

data.title: Aether Holdings Forms Joint Venture with OORT to Build a Foundational Data Infrastructure for Financial AI
data.description: On March 31, 2026, Aether Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: ATHR) revealed the establishment of Aether DataHub, LLC in collaboration with OORTech Inc. (OORT). Aether, a financial technology holding company, focuses on creating data-driven platforms and media assets for investors. Aether DataHub operates as a joint venture aimed at leveraging OORTech's expertise in decentralized artificial intelligence (AI) data cloud services. OORTech is known for offering a community-powered platform for extensive data gathering, labeling, and verification, contributing to a global scale of service provision.

data.title: GMEX Robotics Advances Development of Intelligent Robot Chassis
data.description: In Sydney, Australia on March 31, 2026, GMEX Robotics Corporation (NASDAQ: GMEX) shared that they are progressing with the development and incorporation of their Intelligent Robot Chassis, a significant innovation aimed at boosting the durability, movement, and operational security of self-governing robots in various sectors. Concurrently, GMEX is working towards obtaining intellectual property rights in strategic regions like Southeast Asia, China, Australia, and the United States, as a vital aspect of their overall technology approach.

data.title: Standard Chartered predicts stablecoin market to hit $2 trillion as turnovers double in 2 years with rising AI payments and traditional finance use.
data.description: Over the last two years, the turnover of stablecoins has increased twofold as their adoption in AI payments and traditional finance continues to expand. Despite this, Standard Chartered projects that the market will eventually reach $2 trillion.

data.title: Security Clearance Compensation Climbs to Record High Amid Federal Workforce Uncertainty, According to ClearanceJobs Report
data.description: In Centennial, Colorado, DHI Group, Inc. (NYSE: DHX) revealed that its online platform ClearanceJobs has launched the 2026 Security Clearance Compensation Report. This report indicates that despite various challenges such as return-to-office requirements, agency reorganizations, and overarching policy changes affecting national security professionals, the average total compensation for cleared individuals increased by close to 6% in 2025. This surge propelled average total compensation to an unprecedented peak.

data.title: Blue Point‑Backed National Safety Apparel Turns Up Protection with Addition of HPFR and HiViz Product Lines
data.description: In a recent development in Cleveland, Blue Point Capital Partners and National Safety Apparel have revealed their acquisition of two product lines from Lakeland Industries. This announcement marks a significant move in the industrial safety sector. The specific details of the acquisition, including financial terms and the products involved, were not disclosed. This strategic business decision highlights the ongoing evolution and growth within the industry.

data.title: Gen Z Driving the Shift from Cards to Digital Wallets, New Research from Global Payments Suggests
data.description: Atlanta-based company Global Payments (NYSE: GPN) has revealed the latest edition of its Global Payments Report, marking the 11th annual release by its Worldpay® division.
